holdings.infoBox: MFSV is an equity ETF with a total of 62 individual holdings. The top holdings are JPMorgan Chase & Co. stock at 4.71%, KLA Corporation at 3.55%, Morgan Stanley at 3.11%, Amazon.com at 2.81%, and The Cigna Group at 2.78%.

overview.description: The MFS Active Value ETF (MFSV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US and non-US value stocks of any market capitalization. The fund utilizes a bottom-up fundamental approach to select investments. MFSV was launched on Dec 5, 2024 and is issued by MFS.

data.title: MFS Enters Active ETF Market
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--MFS® today launched the firm's first actively managed exchange-traded funds, marking its entry into the fast-growing active ETF market, which now accounts for nearly $700 bill...
